objective: NYC-only paper evaluation of binary any-rain KXRAIN markets. Kalshi currently lists rain markets only for New York; other watchlist cities are excluded until they appear. 30-day paper gate before any real-money consideration.

rationale.v1_notes: Initial launch. NYC is the only city with open KXRAIN markets per the 2026-04-20 discovery pass (data/rain_market_inventory.csv). Those markets have blank yes_ask and zero volume_24h, so min_volume24hr is set to 0 rather than the 500 originally planned — otherwise no opportunities would ever pass the filter during paper-trade evaluation. Both volume and edge behavior will be re-evaluated once the paper-trade ledger has 30 days of NYC rain rows. min_abs_edge mirrors temp policy v4 (0.15). max_hours_to_settlement is 48h because KXRAINNYC markets close at 23:59 UTC, so a 24h horizon would cut out half the tradable window. BUY-only on YES side, mirroring temp v4's cautious posture.
